title: Mouroucoa nicaraguensis
taxonomy: Mouroucoa nicaraguensis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Achariaceae. It belongs to the genus Mouroucoa, which is a group of plants native to Central America. Mouroucoa nicaraguensis is a small tree or shrub that is native to Nicaragua. Further classification of Mouroucoa nicaraguensis places it in the order Malpighiales and the class Magnoliopsida. The exact classification may vary depending on the source, but Mouroucoa nicaraguensis is generally recognized as a member of the Achariaceae family.
